summary: Audit Log Viewer UI testing complete. All 15 features verified working correctly. The History button opens a right-side drawer (Sheet component), displays audit log entries with change type badges (update=blue, toggle=amber), operator names, relative timestamps (with absolute on hover), and structured diffs with color highlighting. Expandable entries show side-by-side JSON comparison with red (Before) and green (After) backgrounds. All 3 rules tested (low_battery, signal_degradation, reboot_anomaly). Edit modal and toggle switch continue to function properly.

issues: Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' - accessibility improvement recommended

critical_code_review_comments: History button per rule row has correct data-testid='rule-history-{rule_name}' - VERIFIED
Clicking History opens right-side Sheet drawer with data-testid='audit-log-drawer' - VERIFIED
Drawer header shows 'Change History' title and rule name - VERIFIED
Drawer loads audit entries from GET /api/operator/health-rules/{rule_name}/audit-log - VERIFIED
Change type badge styling: update=bg-blue-100 text-blue-700, toggle=bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 - VERIFIED
Operator name displayed with User icon - VERIFIED
Relative timestamp shown (e.g., '8m ago') with absolute timestamp in title attribute - VERIFIED
Structured diff summary with red strikethrough (old) and green (new) values - VERIFIED
Expandable entries toggle on header click - VERIFIED
Expanded view shows absolute timestamp and IP address - VERIFIED
Before snapshot has red background (bg-red-50), After has green (bg-emerald-50) - VERIFIED
Drawer closes with X button - VERIFIED
Drawer closes by clicking outside (overlay) - VERIFIED
History works for all 3 rules: low_battery (64 entries), signal_degradation (64 entries), reboot_anomaly - VERIFIED
Edit modal still works after viewing audit log - VERIFIED
Toggle switch works with optimistic UI - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: None - tests used existing audit entries from previous testing (~64 entries per rule)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Audit Log Viewer UI is fully functional. Key data-testid values: rule-history-{rule_name} (buttons), audit-log-drawer (drawer), audit-log-list (entries container), audit-entry-{created_at} (entry wrapper), audit-entry-header (clickable), audit-change-type (badge), audit-operator (name), audit-timestamp (time), audit-entry-detail (expanded), audit-old-config (before JSON), audit-new-config (after JSON), audit-empty (empty state). Sheet drawer from shadcn/ui used. Entries expand/collapse on header click showing side-by-side JSON diff.
